title: Project Telos Twenty-Fourth Wave Social Comment Claims

claims.text: The twenty-fourth wave social comment packet records the current Project Telos tool snapshot for Index, Forum, Gather, Crucible, and Telos before public outreach drafting.
claims.falsification: The packet omits the tool snapshot or records versions/statuses that differ from the refreshed MCP status checks.

claims.text: The packet provides exact text for 17 public social comments across Reddit, YouTube, and blog/social discussion surfaces.
claims.falsification: The packet contains fewer than 17 exact comment entries or lacks coverage across the stated platform classes.

claims.text: The packet preserves the public side-effect boundary by marking all comments as prepared but not posted and requiring action-time confirmation before posting.
claims.falsification: The packet claims comments were posted or authorizes posting without exact destination and exact-text confirmation.

claims.text: The exact comment texts avoid direct repository links by default while allowing a Project Telos repository link only when a thread explicitly asks for tools, links, repos, or self-promotion.
claims.falsification: The exact comment text includes a direct Project Telos repository URL or encourages link posting regardless of thread context.

claims.text: The quant and trading comments are framed as engineering validation and falsification guidance rather than financial advice.
claims.falsification: The quant or trading comments recommend buying, selling, deploying capital, or expecting a specific return.
